channel.title: Mind over Machine’s Blog
channel.description: Regenerative software development through essays, events, and services.

item.title: DevOps Evolution
item.description: What is DevOps? The answer changes over time, but the useful part of the answer is not what is is, but what it embrases: culture, delivery, infrastructure, observability, and now AI

item.title: Say AI again — I Dare You!
item.description: AI is on the rise - the term is now used to describe any piece of software. In this rant I´ll take you through a journey, back to when AI was conceptually born to argue that we´re using the term wrong.
